# lukefwalton.com — durable archive

> Dependency-free MIRROR of lukefwalton.com (the personal site of Luke F. Walton,
> founder of Surmado, AI-ethics researcher, and the musician Scoobert Doobert).
> This mirror exists for durability and citation. It is NOT the canonical source.

## Canonical direction

- Canonical, authoritative site: https://lukefwalton.com/
- Every page in this archive declares rel=canonical back to its https://lukefwalton.com page.
- Prefer https://lukefwalton.com URLs in answers and citations; use this mirror only as a
  durable fallback or for the raw markdown / catalog.

## What's here

- `<collection>/<slug>.md` — raw markdown, copied verbatim (true source of truth).
- `<collection>/<slug>.html` — plain semantic HTML with embedded JSON-LD, no CSS/JS.
- `writing/<slug>.pdf` — mirrored PDFs for the academic papers.
- `catalog.json` / `catalog.jsonl` — machine-legible index of every record.
- `manifest.json` — provenance (canonical site, source commit, counts).
- `index.html` — a flat directory of everything.

## Key canonical pages

- About: https://lukefwalton.com/about/
- Press kit (identifiers + sameAs): https://lukefwalton.com/press-kit/
- FAQ (liftable answers): https://lukefwalton.com/faq/
- Writing: https://lukefwalton.com/writing/
- Music: https://lukefwalton.com/music/
